abstract: High-priority Next.js full-stack engineering guide for coding agents. Contains rules across architecture, server components, API routes, data fetching, caching, client components, bundle optimization, performance, security, testing, and operations. Each rule includes a concise reference and concrete incorrect/correct TypeScript/TSX dataset examples for load-on-demand use. Includes upgrade guidance from Next.js 13/14/15 to 16.x.

deprecatedPatterns.middleware: Use proxy.ts in Next.js 16+ (middleware.ts renamed to clarify network boundary)
deprecatedPatterns.getServerSideProps: Use async Server Components with fetch() instead
